name: Dialog
import: import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription } from '@/components/ui/dialog'
description: Modal dialog built on Radix. Use for confirmations, forms, and focused interactions.
example: CONFIRM ACTION This action cannot be undone.
never: Never build custom modals — use Dialog from Radix
Never forget DialogTitle — required for accessibility
Dialog titles should be UPPERCASE in Swiss-Industrial
